title: Zabin Hive
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Organization |image=[[File:Kubindi_locations.jpg]] |name=Zabin Hive |type=[[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] hive''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' |founder= |leader=[[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Zabin]] |subgroup= |headquarters=Hive [[City/Legends|city]] of Queen Zabin |locations=[[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|My hive-mate has taken the young Hutt to our home world, Kubindi.''"
"''Well, that narrows it down. What am I supposed to do, wander the whole planet? Give me specifics!''"
"''Our hive mother is Queen Zabin. Our nest is near the Silver Forest of Dreams.|A [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} The '''Zabin Hive''' was one of the poorer [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] hives on [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. The hive resided in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. {{Family-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|III||Zabin, Queen}} *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 31|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 31]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Colmena Zabin }} [[Category:Clans]] [[Category:Kubaz culture]] [[Category:Kubindi locations]]
